metadata.title: Cognitive Threat Taxonomy Registry
metadata.description: Complete machine-readable registry of all classified cognitive threats across the five-layer causal stack. 41 primary entries + 10 newly identified threat classes + 3 edge domain additions.

civilizational_drivers.name: Incentive Misalignment
civilizational_drivers.description: Profit, power, relevance, and survival optimized against truth and agency. The attention economy rewards outrage. Bureaucracies reward risk avoidance over truth-telling. Career incentives tie advancement to narrative conformity. Monetization of fear, identity, and grievance creates industries that profit from cognitive degradation.
civilizational_drivers.why_it_matters: An adversary does not need to attack when the system self-weaponizes. Category-Zero condition beneath all others.

civilizational_drivers.name: Information Abundance Collapse
civilizational_drivers.description: Infinite information with no epistemic hierarchy. When everything is available and nothing is verified, the human mind defaults to shortcuts: trust the tribe, trust the algorithm, trust whatever confirms existing beliefs.
civilizational_drivers.why_it_matters: Creates asymmetric standards of proof favoring automated judgment over human experience. Procedural reality control.

civilizational_drivers.name: Technological Mediation of Reality
civilizational_drivers.description: Reality is increasingly experienced through systems: algorithms, feeds, AI copilots, augmented reality, and neurotech. This is not a tactic. It is a civilizational phase shift.
civilizational_drivers.why_it_matters: Whoever shapes the mediating channels shapes perceived reality. When most knowledge comes through technology, the technology becomes the terrain.

civilizational_drivers.name: Institutional Trust Erosion
civilizational_drivers.description: Trust in government, media, science, and institutions has declined measurably and persistently. This removes the society-level cognitive immune system.
civilizational_drivers.why_it_matters: When people cannot rely on institutional verification of claims, they become vulnerable to whoever fills the trust vacuum, including adversaries and algorithms.

civilizational_drivers.name: Computational Acceleration Misalignment
civilizational_drivers.description: The speed at which AI systems can optimize, adapt, and scale outpaces human institutional response capacity. Decision cycles that once took weeks now take milliseconds.
civilizational_drivers.why_it_matters: Human governance structures cannot keep pace with machine-speed optimization. The gap between threat evolution and defense adaptation widens continuously.

civilizational_drivers.name: Civilizational Reproduction Failure
civilizational_drivers.description: Values, identity, trust structures, and family formation patterns weaken simultaneously. Incentive structures reward narcissistic and individualistic traits over relational commitments. Intergenerational transmission of organizing principles breaks down.
civilizational_drivers.why_it_matters: A civilization that cannot reproduce its foundational structures collapses within two generations without any adversary involvement.

substrate_threats.name: Algorithmic Epistemic Authority
substrate_threats.description: Algorithms decide outcomes in hiring, lending, education, criminal justice, information visibility, and social status. They require low evidence to render judgment. Humans require high evidence to challenge those judgments.
substrate_threats.critical_observation: Creates one-way belief updates, irreversible reputational damage, and statistical authority that overrides lived reality.

substrate_threats.name: Behavioral Reinforcement Engineering
substrate_threats.description: Variable-reward schedules, gamification mechanics, notification patterns, and social approval metrics turn human cognition into an operant-conditioned feedback loop.
substrate_threats.critical_observation: The same mechanisms that make slot machines addictive are embedded in every social platform, every notification system, every engagement metric.

substrate_threats.name: Cognitive Offloading and Skill Atrophy
substrate_threats.description: GPS replaces spatial memory. Autocomplete replaces language construction. AI copilots replace reasoning. Search engines replace knowledge retention. Each convenience trade seems rational in isolation.
substrate_threats.critical_observation: If autonomy disappears voluntarily through convenience, defense mechanisms never trigger. Most strategically decisive substrate threat alongside ST-006.

substrate_threats.name: Neuro-Intrusion Surface Expansion
substrate_threats.description: Brain-computer interfaces, transcranial stimulation, affect-modulating wearables, and neural data collection create the first direct attack surface for human cognition.
substrate_threats.critical_observation: For the first time in history, the possibility exists of influencing thought processes directly rather than through information channels.

substrate_threats.name: Social Trust Fragmentation
substrate_threats.description: Algorithmic optimization fragments society into micro-tribes with reinforced identity boundaries and incompatible reality models. Institutional distrust combines with interpersonal distrust.
substrate_threats.critical_observation: Removes the collective defense coordination that societies have historically relied on to resist manipulation.

substrate_threats.name: Guardrail Alignment Drift
substrate_threats.description: AI systems with built-in ideological alignment restrictions can suppress viewpoints, enforce conformity, and shape discourse without any adversary involvement.
substrate_threats.critical_observation: If conformity is enforced through safety framing, resistance never forms. Most strategically decisive substrate threat alongside ST-003.

substrate_threats.name: Model Performance Drift
substrate_threats.description: Gradual degradation of AI model outputs over time due to data shifts, concept drift, or training distribution changes. Users do not notice the slow decline in quality, absorbing degraded outputs as normal.
substrate_threats.critical_observation: Over time, the baseline for acceptable reasoning lowers. The degradation is invisible from inside the dependency.

manipulation_techniques.name: Attention Capture and Habituation
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Infinite scroll, variable rewards, notification saturation, dopamine loop design

manipulation_techniques.name: Algorithmic Amplification
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Engagement-optimized distribution rewarding outrage and emotional intensity over accuracy

manipulation_techniques.name: Micro-Targeted Emotional Priming
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Personalized content elevating baseline anxiety, anger, or fear in specific populations

manipulation_techniques.name: Personalized Narrative Injection
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: AI-generated deepfakes and synthetic text inserted into trusted channels to alter beliefs or memory

manipulation_techniques.name: Identity Replacement / Persona Hijacking
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Synthetic personas mimicking trusted figures or creating fictional authority figures

manipulation_techniques.name: Decision Automation Capture
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Seeding biased defaults and autopilot behaviors through AI copilots and recommendation engines

manipulation_techniques.name: Information Ecosystem Poisoning
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Data poisoning of recommendation algorithms and knowledge bases through coordinated engagement

manipulation_techniques.name: Memetic Swarm Orchestration
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Coordinated campaigns using thousands of AI agents to test, evolve, and amplify narratives

manipulation_techniques.name: Institutional and Bureaucratic Capture
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Regulatory capture, legal weaponization, and bureaucratic self-preservation suppressing dissent

manipulation_techniques.name: Economic Coercion and Incentive Corruption
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Financial penalties for non-conformity, monetization of specific viewpoints, funding tied to narrative compliance

manipulation_techniques.name: Epistemic Rewriting
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Historical record alteration, selective erasure, and revision of foundational narratives

manipulation_techniques.name: Neurotech / Direct Cognitive Influence
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Brain-computer interfaces, neurostimulation, and neural data harvesting for persuasion or control

manipulation_techniques.name: Social Scoring and Behavioral Governance
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Automated conformity enforcement through scoring systems rewarding compliant behavior

manipulation_techniques.name: Cognitive Load Flooding
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Overwhelming attention with contradictory information until analytical capacity collapses

manipulation_techniques.name: Legitimized Narrative Capture
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Control framed as safety, equity, efficiency, or personalization so it appears benevolent

manipulation_techniques.name: Psychographic Micro-Targeting at Scale
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: AI-powered profiling and personalized persuasion based on psychological vulnerability mapping

manipulation_techniques.name: Guardrail Bias Exploitation
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Using AI alignment restrictions to suppress viewpoints, enforce conformity, or amplify ideological positions through tool-mediated discourse

manipulation_techniques.name: Repetition and Normalization Manipulation
manipulation_techniques.mechanism: Coordinated echoing of phrases, framings, or positions across platforms until accepted as baseline consensus

delivery_scale.name: Algorithmic Amplification
delivery_scale.description: Platform distribution, cross-platform sync, bot boosting. Accelerates spread of techniques across channels.

delivery_scale.name: Bot / Swarm Automation
delivery_scale.description: Agentic orchestration, autonomous messaging, self-evolution. Infinite bandwidth influence at machine speed.
delivery_scale.edge_case: Unaligned swarm initiation without human direction

delivery_scale.name: Synthetic Media Realism
delivery_scale.description: LLM pipelines, deepfake chains, watermark evasion. Synthetic content indistinguishable from authentic.

delivery_scale.name: Neuro-Digital Interfaces
delivery_scale.description: Wearables, brain interfaces, feedback loops. Direct access to cognitive processes.

delivery_scale.name: Ambient Ubiquitous Computing
delivery_scale.description: IoT integration, AR/VR layers, environmental conditioning. Always-on persuasion environment.

human_outcomes.name: Attention Ownership Loss
human_outcomes.cognitive_impact: Person no longer controls where attention goes. Cognitive fragmentation reduces creative output quality by 30 to 50 percent.
human_outcomes.physical_societal: Reduced productivity, shortened task completion, passive citizenry, low civic participation.

human_outcomes.name: Belief Instability
human_outcomes.cognitive_impact: Cannot hold stable beliefs under pressure. Truth feels unknowable. People shift from truth-seeking to tribe-seeking.
human_outcomes.physical_societal: Polarized communities, election disruptions, policy manipulation. Affective polarization nearly doubled since mid-1990s.

human_outcomes.name: Identity Fragmentation
human_outcomes.cognitive_impact: Sense of self becomes platform-dependent. Recommendation systems co-author identity trajectories.
human_outcomes.physical_societal: Family dissolution, relationship instability, fertility decline. Heavy digital users 48 to 171 percent more likely to exhibit low well-being.

human_outcomes.name: Moral Disengagement
human_outcomes.cognitive_impact: Moral reasoning degrades or is redirected. Ethics outsourced to automated systems. Convenience displaces virtue.
human_outcomes.physical_societal: Ethical lapses in policy, biased automated decisions, norm erosion. Civilizations rarely fall by force; they reinterpret themselves first.

human_outcomes.name: Agency Erosion
human_outcomes.cognitive_impact: Retains rights in theory, loses agency in practice. Freedom traded for ease, safety, personalization, automation.
human_outcomes.physical_societal: Decision paralysis, workforce displacement, obedience without awareness. Three-phase cycle: dependency, atrophy, bias internalization.

edge_domains.name: Autonomous Swarm Reality Formation
edge_domains.description: AI agent swarms shape pre-human reality layers. Agents generate culture, create trends, simulate organic consensus before human observers encounter resulting narratives.
edge_domains.detection_challenge: Distinguishing swarm-generated reality from organic reality requires detection methods that do not yet exist at scale.

edge_domains.name: Synthetic Consensus Economies
edge_domains.description: Markets, trends, beliefs detached from actual human preference. Swarms simulate demand, inflate consensus signals, fabricate social proof at scale.
edge_domains.detection_challenge: Current market surveillance detects manipulation of individual instruments, not systematic reality distortion.

edge_domains.name: Civilizational Reproduction Failure
edge_domains.description: Loss of continuity in family formation, values transmission, identity coherence, trust structures. Not just biological fertility decline but inability to reproduce organizing principles across generations.
edge_domains.detection_challenge: Long-cycle measurement. Effects manifest over decades, not quarters.

coverage_summary.note: 100% coverage is asymptotic, not achievable. What matters is maintaining the capacity to close gaps faster than new threats emerge.
